# makeBlockBuffer(copying:)

**Instance Method**

Creates a block buffer by copying the given audio buffer list.

## Declaration

```swift
final func makeBlockBuffer(copying audioBuffers: UnsafePointer<AudioBufferList>) -> CMMutableDataBlockBuffer
```
